  "claims": [
    "AB 937 will consolidate state support for farmers seeking organic certification.",
    "AB 937 creates a one-stop shop for financial assistance for organic farmers.",
    "AB 937 provides farmers with growing market opportunities.",
    "AB 947 expands Healthy Soils Program’s training, technical assistance, and equipment sharing capabilities.",
    "AB 947 prioritizes support for small farmers and ranchers.",
    "AB 937 is important for implementing California’s Climate Change Scoping Plan.",
    "AB 937 would award grants to nonprofit organizations to incentivize farmers and ranchers to transition land to certified organic production.",
    "AB 947 expands eligible technical assistance under the Healthy Soils Program to include training, conservation agricultural planning, and grant writing.",
    "AB 947 requires funds to be provided to technical assistance providers to support farmers and ranchers in the application process for grants.",
